name: heartbeat
title: HEARTBEAT.md - Monitoring Configuration
content:
# HEARTBEAT.md - Proactive Monitoring Tasks

## Message Delivery

**Primary Alert Channel:** #self-improvement (ID: 1469266129183571978)
- Morning briefings
- GitHub alerts
- Calendar proximity alerts
- Reminder notifications
- System status updates

## Monitoring Schedule

### Discord (every ~30 min)
- Check for @mentions
- Scan for missed messages
- Respond to DMs from Calvin

### Apple Reminders (ACTIVE)
- Overdue alerts
- Due within 2 hours
- Morning summary (8am)

### Apple Calendar (ACTIVE)
- Meeting alerts (<2h)
- Daily schedule (8am, 12pm, 5pm)

### GitHub (ACTIVE)
- Stale PRs (>48h)
- Critical issues

**Work Hours:** Monday-Friday, 8am-5pm (Africa/Kampala)
